narrative_beat: Close-up relogio antigo marcando 23:58:35, ponteiros dourados

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an antique wall clock with Roman numerals, golden hands pointing to 23:58:35, the second hand trembling, warm amber light on the clock face against a dark wall
subject.secondary: Dark wall in monochrome. Faint dust motes around clock.
props: antique wall clock with Roman numerals

environment.time_of_day: dim ambient with clock face lit
environment.atmosphere: terminal countdown, the schedule is written on the cover

composition.foreground: golden clock face and hands in vivid warm tones

lighting.key_light: warm amber light illuminating clock face from left

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: terminal, the delivery time is on the cover

symbolism.primary: the agenda has a delivery schedule — and the time is almost up
symbolism.secondary: 85 seconds to midnight as literal countdown

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
